title: UPI OC No 177 FY 23 24 UPI Global Acceptance limits, launch of Reverse Acceptance and Country code enablement
text:
Nee)

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA
NPCI/UPI/OC - 177/2023-24 315* October 2023

To,
All Members of the Unified Payments Interface (UPI)

Dear Sir/Madam,

Subject:

1. Revision of UPI Global Acceptance Limits

2. Launch of International Mobile Application Payment Acceptance through UPI QR
code in India

3. Currency and Country code enablement for UPI Global Acceptance Transactions

1. Revision for UPI Global Acceptance Limits

The per-transaction limit for UPI Global to be the same as that of UPI, and UPI Global
transactions to be included in the per-day limit of UPI. For existing limits refer to NPCI/UPI/OC
No.120/2021 dated 24% September 2021 (this is subjected to change from time to time).

Member Banks (Payer PSP and Remitter) and UPI Application are requested to take note of
the above and undertake required changes. Members are requested to make the necessary
changes by 30" November 2023.

2. Launch of International Mobile Application Payment Acceptance through UPI QR
code in India

In order to promote UP! payment platform globally, International Mobile Application Payment
Acceptance through UPI QR code in India has been introduced. This wil! enable Indian
Merchants to accept payments from international customers through their International Mobile
Application by scanning UPI QR codes in India.

In online transaction request, purpose code of these transactions will be “60”.

Member Banks (Payee PSP) and Merchants are requested to take note of the above
enhancement and undertake required changes. Members are requested to make the
necessary changes by 31% December 2023.

3. Currency/Country code enablement for UP! Global Acceptance Transactions

Members were informed that International Merchant Payments through UPI (UPI Global) is
live for Singapore, UAE and Bhutan through below circulars:

JOOIA, The Capital, B Wing, 10" Floor,

Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 053-
T: +91 22 40009100 F: +91 22 40009101
contact@npci.org.in www.npci.org.in

CIN; U74990MH2008NPL189067


NRE

A. NPCI/UPI/OC No.93/2020-21 dated 4 September, 2020 regarding Introduction of 7" /*
International Merchant payments through UPI (UPI Global).

B. NPCVUPI/OC No.117/2021-22 dated 8° September, 2021 regarding International

Merchant Payment acceptance through UPI (UPI Global).

NPC! and NIPL is working towards on-boarding new partners on the UPI platform (UPI Giobal)
for furthering UPI Global Acceptance in multiple countries. To provide seamless experience
to the customers, Members (Remitter Banks, Payer PSP Banks and UPI! Applications) to

enable the following country and currency code.

Member Banks (Payer PSP and Remitter) and UP! Application are requested to take note of
the above enhancement and undertake required changes. Members are requested to make
the necessary changes by 31% December 2023.

Further, it was also incumbent upon the banks to abide by the extant and future RBI, FEMA
and other relevant guidelines.

Yours faithfully,
SD/-
Kunal Kalawatia
